body_txt: In which several characters from the same work share a set of initials. Disproportionately likely to be the author's own initials; otherwise, usually signals a further commonality of some kind. The characters themselves may or may not notice. A subtrope of Theme Naming and supertrope to Alliterative Family . Sister Trope to Letter Motif . See also Alphabetical Theme Naming and Alliterative Name .
